calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-19-2008 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings reported by: Helen Sorep-Matley, CSR 225. (212)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-11-2008 Continued To Feb-19-08 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Minor'S Compromise.
Off Calendar Dec-06-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: Sajja Ravinantapricha & Carla Amador, CSR: Karen Farnsworth CSR #5162 (Department 218)

Appearances
Petitioner, Shannan Kwan, is present as Guardian ad litem for Zachary Gee, a minor Claimant, who is also present.
Attorney, Steve Ngo and Dale Minani, appearing on behalf of the petitioner and claimant.

Shannan Kwan is sworn. Counsel presents the case to the Court.

On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved. The total gross amount of judgment in favor of the minor claimant is $168,000.00. From the total judgment of $168,000.00, payment of fees is to be disbursed as follows: attorneys fees in the sum of $46,633.07 payable to Minami Tamaki LLP, Reimbursement for medical and all other expenses expenses paid by the petitioner or attorney in the sum of $2,256.08, Medical, hospital, ambulance etc. in the sum of $13,858.03.

The balance of the judgment available for the claimant after payment of all allowed fess and expenses is $105,252.82, which is to deposited into a blocked account with The Bank of San Francisco, 575 Market Street, Suite 2400, San Francisco, CA. No withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years old.

Order Approving Compromise of Disputed Claim and Order to Deposit Money Into Blocked Account signed by Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-22-2007 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jan-15-08 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-10-2007 Off Calendar
